evidence: "I love all of Steven's music and this DVD is just wonderful."
"This is pure entertainment from beginning to end."
"You won't go wrong. You'll laugh and you'll cry and say I remember it well."
"This is still one of my old time favorites. Great acting, breathtaking landscapes, wonderful music score and a moral message that we in this new century will never see the likes of again."
"A beautiful story of a time long gone."
"The restoration is unbelievably spectacular and the sound in the ATMOS selection is clean, wonderful and crisp."
"Outstanding, breathtaking, incredible 5.1 stereo, beautiful costumes, wonderful musical actors is only part of the wonders of this 'That's Entertainment' Trilogy."
"Then the beautiful soundtrack by Max Steiner, my favorite movie composer of all times, writes the most incredible music for feature films."
"I come from the stage anyway and seen and worked with the best so for me I've always been extremely critical of the new modern movie musical but 'La La Land', I take my hat off you."
"The sound is basically mono until Dorothy lands in Oz. From that point on, you will be blown away."
"The restoration is even better than I thought it would be. Perfect picture and wonderful 5.1 sound."
"The ending with the original casts, it was enough to make you cry. Pure magic."
"This entire film will make your heart pound and only wish that Hollywood could produce something like this again."

summary: The user has a strong preference for classic musicals and films, valuing high production quality and emotional storytelling. They express nostalgia for the artistry of older films and a critical view of modern cinema, particularly regarding its lack of talent and creativity.
